steps.title: Identify the underlined claim
steps.content: The underlined claim: as nueva canción spread beyond Chile, the breadth of musical traditions incorporated into its foundation expanded. The right detail must show nueva canción drawing on a tradition from outside Chile.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice B describes nueva canción songs influenced by corrido, a Mexican genre — a non-Chilean tradition becoming part of the movement's musical foundation.

A focuses on themes, not musical traditions. C addresses geographic spread, not musical breadth. D uses an instrument also traditional in Chile — not a tradition from beyond Chile.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
